mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE id=#{userId} AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT nickname FROM app_user WHERE id=#{userId} AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE follower_user_id=#{followerUserId} AND followed_user_id=#{followedUserId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE follower_user_id=#{followerUserId} AND followed_user_id=#{followedUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE followed_user_id=#{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE follower_user_id=#{userId}
mapper.sql: u.id,u.nickname,u.avatar,u.signature,u.level,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow fc WHERE fc.followed_user_id=u.id) follower_count,f.created_at followed_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_follow f JOIN app_user u ON u.id=f.follower_user_id WHERE f.followed_user_id=#{userId} AND u.status=1 AND u.is_deleted=FALSE ORDER BY f.created_at DESC,f.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM user_follow f JOIN app_user u ON u.id=f.followed_user_id WHERE f.follower_user_id=#{userId} AND u.status=1 AND u.is_deleted=FALSE ORDER BY f.created_at DESC,f.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
